title: oldenlandia horneriana
intro: Oldenlandia horneriana, also known as Chinese ephedra or smallflower oldenlandia, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Oldenlandia horneriana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches and body aches, and prevent the development of certain diseases. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia horneriana is often used as a decoction or infusion, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
